text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening, as Curren Chan brings me through
the shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh! There it is! There it is! ♪

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Let's play the raffle! ♪ I have a ticket!
choice_data_list:
Is that why you brought me to the shopping
district?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Let's play the raffle! ♪ I have a ticket!
choice_data_list:
Is that why you brought me to the shopping
district?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe! Yup! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I thought it'd be to fun to play the raffle
together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I thought it'd be to fun to play the raffle
together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And I want you to film me spinning the lever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To Curren Chan, it looks like the social media
post is more important than the actual prize.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I knew you'd say that. ♪ Take my phone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I knew you'd say that. ♪ Take my phone! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As cute as ever, Curren Chan puts her hand on
the lever... and... and...
choice_data_list: Are you going to spin it or what?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It'd be boring if I did it right away! ♪ Okay, here I
go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And she spins it! A small plastic ball drops from
the tumbler's opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ohhh!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ohhh!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow! I never thought I'd get the grand prize! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking the bushel of carrots would make
for the best pic, but...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I guess my cuteness just drew in the big one! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Assuming she'd get at least the second-place
prize is very typical of Curren Chan...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Aaand here you go! You take it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Aaand here you go! You take it!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I got a good vid, so I'm happy. ♪ Think of it as a
thank-you for coming with me.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It sure would make me happy to know you got in
a good break, whenever that may be.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It sure would make me happy to know you got in
a good break, whenever that may be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She does whatever it takes to get everything she
wants but doesn't care much for what she gets by
chance... That's so like Curren Chan. Still...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Awww. Well, too bad. I already gave it to you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh! I know...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'll take it back if you can catch me!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ready, go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how hard I run, there's no way I can
catch up with her...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Good job, Big Bro. But unfortunately for you, I
win this time!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Good job, Big Sis. But unfortunately for you, I win
this time!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow, you really went for it, though! That's so
like you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow, you really went for it, though! That's so
like you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's an opportunity to take a break without me
around, so you should've just accepted it in the
first place.
choice_data_list: You need to take a break too, Curren.
You need to take a break too, Curren.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's a hard worker, but she tends to take on
everything herself. I tell her how I think she needs
to rest as well.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...I getcha. You'll do anything for me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You're something else, Big Bro...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You're something else, Big Sis...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, you win. I guess there's such a thing as
having someone care about you too much. Haha!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Once everything settles down and we have some
time, let's go together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I end up holding onto the coupon for
the hot spring vacation.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪ Did you hear that? Deluxe!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I kinda feel like "deluxe" should be more than
just a hamburger steak.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I want everything to be deluxe, like a party or
something! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sooo... let's look around the shopping district
some more before we leave.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I wanna get some decorations... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: By the way, do you like cooking?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: By the way, do you like cooking?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm just making small talk. As for me...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I like cooking when I have to, I guess. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You know, I'd looove to try your cooking
sometime.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You know, I'd looove to try your cooking
sometime.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we head back to the academy and have a
deluxe carrot hamburger steak party...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, I end up being the chef and
having to serve Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow! That's a really big bushel!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
This reminds me of harvest festivals. I bet they'd
look cute displayed in a box. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
My outfit has orange in it today as well... It's
perfect!
choice_data_list: Were you... shooting for this prize?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. It's just a coincidence. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I just heard that the carrots in the raffle were
suuuuper sweet and a really pretty orange!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Can you help me out with some pics when we get
back?
choice_data_list: Sure, I can take a few pictures.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Can you help me out with some pics when we get
back?
choice_data_list: Sure, I can take a few pictures.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh no, you won't be the one taking them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Curren Chan posts online with the caption,
"#AllTheseCarrots #EatenbytheStaff."

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...One carrot, huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Nooo...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking about what I can do with just
one carrot. But I've got it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: First, I put the carrot next to my face, and... Flash! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Perfect! ♪ Now for a caption...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"#CarrotChallenge #Carrot #PerfectForPics
#CuteCurrenChan"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...I think I'll roast the carrot.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her post, #CarrotChallenge trends on
Umastagram for a while.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hah. Oh, well. It's just a raffle, after all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right. I wanna go shopping before
going home.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I need new makeup brushes for my pics and vids.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I should get some spares too, so I guess
about a hundred should be enough.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Do you still have some time? Would you come
with me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Do you still have some time? Would you come
with me?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
We're also going to play the raffle another
hundred times or so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing Curren Chan hates more than
losing, so I spend the rest of the day trying to
calm her down. I finally succeed after agreeing to
join her on a date.
